# additional

**Instance Property**

A dictionary that encodes key value pairs to hold additional information about the model.

## Declaration

```swift
var additional: [String : String]?
```

## Accessing metadata

- **author**: The author of the model.
- **shortDescription**: A short text description of the model.
- **license**: The license governing the use of the model.
- **version**: The model version.

items.description: A short text description of the model.
items.name: shortDescription
